nodes.name: deriveBranchName.ts
nodes.summary: Derives a sanitized git branch name from a task's slug and title for use when creating a workspace.

nodes.name: PullRequestsContent.tsx
nodes.summary: Displays a searchable, infinitely-scrolling list of pull requests for the tasks view, with actions to add a PR to a new workspace.

nodes.name: AssigneeFilter.tsx
nodes.summary: Dropdown filter for selecting one or more task assignees in the tasks view top bar.

nodes.name: LinearProjectFilter.tsx
nodes.summary: Dropdown filter for selecting a Linear project to scope the tasks view by.

nodes.name: ProjectFilter.tsx
nodes.summary: Dropdown filter for selecting a project to scope the tasks view by.

nodes.name: RunInWorkspacePopoverV2.tsx
nodes.summary: Popover for launching one or more selected tasks in a new V2 workspace, letting the user pick host, project, and agent.

nodes.name: RunIssuesInWorkspacePopover.tsx
nodes.summary: Popover for launching one or more selected GitHub issues in a new V2 workspace, letting the user pick host, project, and agent.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel file re-exporting the TasksView component.

nodes.name: page.tsx
nodes.summary: Route page showing a GitHub issue's details with markdown body rendering and an action to open it in a new workspace.

nodes.name: layout.tsx
nodes.summary: Route layout wrapper for the tasks section, rendering the shared TasksView shell around nested routes.

nodes.name: page.tsx
nodes.summary: Route page rendering the main tasks list view.

nodes.name: page.tsx
nodes.summary: Route page showing a pull request's details with markdown body rendering and an action to open it in a new workspace.

nodes.name: V2PresetsBar.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders the horizontal bar of pinned agent presets for a V2 workspace, supporting reordering, hotkeys, and quick execution.

nodes.name: V2PresetBarItem.tsx
nodes.summary: Renders a single draggable preset button within the presets bar, including its icon, hotkey badge, and edit/execute actions.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel file re-exporting the V2PresetBarItem component.

nodes.name: useOpenInExternalEditor.ts
nodes.summary: Hook that opens a V2 workspace's project folder in the user's configured external editor.

nodes.name: browserRuntimeRegistry.ts
nodes.summary: Singleton registry managing the lifecycle of Electron webview elements used to render in-app browser panes, including navigation, layout, and history tracking.
nodes.languageNotes: Implements a class-based singleton (the exported browserRuntimeRegistry instance) that manages imperative DOM/webview lifecycle outside React's render cycle, bridging to the Electron main process via tRPC.

nodes.name: deriveBranchName
nodes.summary: Sanitizes a task slug and title into a lowercase, hyphenated git branch name segment.

nodes.name: PullRequestsContent
nodes.summary: Renders an infinite-scrolling, searchable list of pull requests, with an intersection observer to fetch more pages and an action to draft a new workspace from a PR.

nodes.name: AssigneeFilter
nodes.summary: Renders a multi-select dropdown for filtering tasks by assignee, sourced from the local collections.

nodes.name: LinearProjectFilter
nodes.summary: Renders a dropdown for filtering tasks by Linear project.

nodes.name: ProjectFilter
nodes.summary: Renders a dropdown for filtering tasks by project, showing project thumbnails.

nodes.name: RunInWorkspacePopoverV2
nodes.summary: Renders a popover form for creating a new V2 workspace from one or more selected tasks, deriving a branch name and prompt automatically.

nodes.name: RunIssuesInWorkspacePopover
nodes.summary: Renders a popover form for creating a new V2 workspace from one or more selected GitHub issues, deriving a branch name and prompt automatically.

nodes.name: IssueDetailPage
nodes.summary: Renders the full detail view for a GitHub issue, including its markdown description and a header with actions.

nodes.name: Header
nodes.summary: Renders the issue detail page header with title, status badge, back button, and add-to-workspace action.

nodes.name: TasksPage
nodes.summary: Renders the tasks route page by delegating to the TasksView component.

nodes.name: PullRequestDetailPage
nodes.summary: Renders the full detail view for a pull request, including its markdown description and a header with actions.

nodes.name: Header
nodes.summary: Renders the pull request detail page header with title, state badge, back button, and add-to-workspace action.

nodes.name: V2PresetsBar
nodes.summary: Renders the pinned presets bar for a V2 workspace, resolving visible preset order and wiring per-preset hotkeys and drag reordering.

nodes.name: V2PresetBarItem
nodes.summary: Renders a single preset item with its resolved icon, hotkey label, and drag handlers for reordering within the presets bar.

nodes.name: useOpenInExternalEditor
nodes.summary: Returns a callback that opens the given workspace's project directory in the user's preferred external editor via the Electron main process.

nodes.name: BrowserRuntimeRegistryImpl
nodes.summary: Manages a map of active browser pane entries (webview elements, navigation state, listeners), handling attach/detach, navigation commands, and pointer passthrough for window dragging.
